name: Kathy Laub
body: Adding this song to my Lyla Playlist.❤️🎶 Thank you for this and all your posts. As always, we are inspired, strengthened by them. Praying for strength and healing, and the things we don't even know - praying those Holy Spirit things for you.

name: Judy Nichols
body: Oh, my heart! What beautiful faith! I continue to pray.

name: sus smith
body: We are listening to the song right now.....no words to say- just know that we read your words (so well spoken) and know the tears and emotions that go with it. We hold you all close. You are Precious family and you have a remarkable child. With love and prayers. Larry and Susan Smith

name: Natalie Rynard
body: God bless you and your family Lee. We are thankful for the updates, always so eloquently spoken. I, too am in awe of the faith of your sweet girl, and of the way she uplifts others while she goes through these trials. You all are an amazing example of Faith and Strength and I’m glad that HE continues to carry you when times get heavy. We will continue to pray🙏🏻

name: Sondra Rush
body: Love you all! The Rush Family will continue to pray that God our Father will provide all of your needs and that his mighty love-his presence-will continue to fill you to overflow.

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: I am always touched by your family's amazing faith and I see that you always give God the glory. I shall continue to lift you all up in prayer. Loved the Christmas photo.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Man...Lyla continues to inspire beyond her years. I love her so much. We continue to pray for her and each of you. May you all keep seeing His beauty amidst the pain and grief. ❤️
